summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Ayurvedic hospital patient details and prescription management features. Backend APIs 100% functional for all prescription-related features including auto stock deduction. Frontend patient details page fully functional with all tabs, summary cards, and prescription creation dialog working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend Auto Stock Deduction on Prescription Creation
Frontend Patients Page Loading and Navigation
Frontend Summary Cards Display (visits, prescriptions, medicines, balance)
Frontend Tab Navigation (Prescriptions, Visit History, Bills, Patient Info)
Frontend Add Prescription Button and Dialog
Frontend Patient List with View Buttons
All CRUD Operations for Prescription Management
Patient Report Generation with Complete History
